title: Sagamihara, Kanagawa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sagamihara, Kanagawa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sagamihara is a city in Kanagawa with a population of 725,000. A spacious suburban city with abundant green spaces, family-friendly neighborhoods, and easy access to central Tokyo.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
